base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of element_icons — a pickup_item from 1999 chrono cross. Element icons — 6 fields (Red/Blue/Yellow/Green/White/Black) × 10 spell-levels. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
